definition.title: Approval Rate (1h)
definition.description: Share of decisions approved. Sudden drops may indicate bank outages, scoring bugs, or cohort quality shifts.

definition.title: Decisions by Outcome
definition.description: Volume of approved vs declined decisions — ties directly to marketplace GMV opportunity.

definition.title: Credit Limit Buckets
definition.description: Distribution of assigned limits; shift toward $0/$100 signals risk tightening or worse user quality.

definition.title: Decision Latency p50 / p95
definition.description: End-to-end POST /v1/decision latency including bank fetch.

definition.title: Error Rate %
definition.description: 5xx and dependency failures — spikes here can masquerade as approval-rate drops.

definition.title: Webhook Latency (p50/p95)
definition.description: Ledger notification lag; high p95 delays settlement reconciliation.

definition.title: Bank Fetch Failures
definition.description: Upstream bank API errors — investigate before blaming risk model for approval drops.
